CustomField.formula: CASE(ImageURL__c, "eei.png", IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 200, 200), "accenture_white.png", IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 200, 200), "cloudstaff_white.png", IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 200, 200), "quantrics.png", IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 200, 200), "kulturra.png", IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 200, 200), IMAGE("/resource/PortfolioAssets/PortfolioAssets/Company/" + ImageURL__c , "company", 100, 100))
CustomField.label: Company Logo
